headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on International Paper, Lowers Price Target to $36
summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains International Paper (NYSE:IP) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $44 to $36.

raw.headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on International Paper, Lowers Price Target to $36
raw.summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains International Paper (NYSE:IP) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $44 to $36.

headline: Producers launch second wave of containerboard price increases in 2026
summary: International Paper is among several competitors that have joined the June price hike wave that Smurfit Westrock initiated. This comes as executives report rising input costs and demand improvements.

headline: Wells Fargo Upgrades International Paper to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $39
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Gabe Hajde   upgrades International Paper (NYSE:IP) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raises the price target from $38 to $39.
